text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 160 

ORGN_ACQSTN_IND_CD 

LABEL: Organ Acquisition Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the type of organ acquisition received by the beneficiary during the stay. 

SHORT NAME: ORGNCD 

LONG NAME: ORGN_ACQSTN_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: K1 = General classification (revenue code 0810) 
K2 = Living donor kidney (revenue code 0811) 
K3 = Cadaver donor
